news_items.title: United States vs Belgium: Team News and Predicted Lineups - Last Word On Football
news_items.author: Steen Kirby
news_items.text:
United States vs Belgium: Team News and Predicted Lineups - Last Word On Football

## Sports. Honestly. Since 2011

July 4, 2026 By Steen Kirby Featured, International Football, Starting Line-ups, USMNT, World Cup

The round of 16 has arrived and it’s a moment of truth for the World Cup hosts the United States, they take on traditional European powerhouse Belgium. It’s the United States vs Belgium for a spot in the 2026 World Cup quarterfinals. We offer team news and predicted lineups for this pivotal matchup.

Read More: Twelve Years Later, the United States Gets Another Shot at Belgium In The World Cup

## United States vs Belgium

Date: Monday, July 6th, 2026 Venue: Lumen Field in Seattle Kick Off: 20:00 in Seattle Referee: Adham Makhadmeh Current Odds:

### United States Team News

*Editors note, FIFA lifted Folarin Balogun‘s red card suspension on Sunday, meaning he is set to play and start against Belgium.

With Folarin Balogun no longer suspended, The other players out for the USA are Cristian Roldan, who continues to rehab, and Mark McKenzie, neither of whom are considered essential. The USMNT should continue with their 4-3-3 that has been offensively productive all tournam

# USA vs Belgium Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 16

The last time these two played a World Cup knockout game, Tim Howard made 15 saves and the United States still lost. That was Belgium's 2-1 extra-time win in 2014, the game that introduced most Americans who were not already soccer fans to what a goalkeeper can do in a hopeless situation. This is a different USA squad, coached by a different manager who has built a genuine system around pressing and ball retention. It is also a

# Team News: USA vs. Belgium injury, suspension list, predicted XIs

CSBN

CSBN

July 5, 2026

Share

USA and Belgium will meet in the last-16 stage of the 2026 World Cup on Monday.

Co-hosts USA overcame Bosnia-Herzegovina in the round of 32, while Belgium navigated their way past Senegal, and here Sports Mole rounds up the team news for the knockout match.

---

## USA

Out: Folarin Balogun (suspended)

Doubtful: Mark McKenzie (foot), Cristian Roldan (muscle)

Sports Mole’s predicted XI: Freese; Freeman, Richards, Ream, Robinson; Tillman, Adams, McKennie; Dest, Pepi, Pulisic

## BELGIUM

Out: None

Doubtful: Zeno Debast (leg)

Sports Mole’s predicted XI: Courtois; Castagne, Theate, Mechele, De Cuyper; Vanaken, Tielemans; Trossard, De Bruyne, Doku; De Ketelaere

CSBN

news_items.text:
USA vs Belgium – World Cup last 16: Trump, Balogun, prediction, start time | World Cup 2026 News | Al Jazeera

Save

Share

Add Al Jazeera on Google

Folarin Balogun will play against Belgium after FIFA's decision ⁠to suspend ⁠his red-card ban [File: Jamie Squire/Getty Images via AFP]

Four wins to go. How can your team reach the final and win the 2026 World Cup? Click here to find out.

Who: USA vs Belgium What: FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 16 Where: Seattle Stadium in Seattle, Washington, United States When: Monday at 7pm (00:00 GMT going into Tuesday) How to follow: We will have all the build-up on Al Jazeera Sport from 20:30 GMT before our live text commentary stream.

- Why FIFA’s Balogun red card suspension after Trump call is so controversial

- Ronaldo’s last World Cup? We will see, says Portugal star before Spain clash
- ‘It ends here’: Neymar quits international football after Brazil’s loss

## Sports. Honestly. Since 2011

July 4, 2026 By Steen Kirby Featured, International Football, Starting Line-ups, USMNT, World Cup

The round of 16 has arrived and it’s a moment of truth for the World Cup hosts the United States, they take on traditional European powerhouse Belgium. It’s the United States vs Belgium for a spot in the 2026 World Cup quarterfinals. We offer team news and predicted lineups for this pivotal matchup.

Read More: Twelve Years Later, the United States Gets Another Shot at Belgium In The World Cup

## United States vs Belgium

Date: Monday, July 6th, 2026 Venue: Lumen Field in Seattle Kick Off: 20:00 in Seattle Referee: Adham Makhadmeh Current Odds:

### United States Team News

*Editors note, FIFA lifted Folarin Balogun‘s red card suspension on Sunday, meaning he is set to play and start against Belgium.

With Folarin Balogun no longer suspended, The other players out for the USA are Cristian Roldan, who continues to rehab, and Mark McKenzie, neither of whom are considered essential. The USMNT should continue with their 4-3-3 that has been offensively productive all tournam"}

# Team News: USA vs. Belgium injury, suspension list, predicted XIs

CSBN

CSBN

July 5, 2026

Share

USA and Belgium will meet in the last-16 stage of the 2026 World Cup on Monday.

Co-hosts USA overcame Bosnia-Herzegovina in the round of 32, while Belgium navigated their way past Senegal, and here Sports Mole rounds up the team news for the knockout match.

---

## USA

Out: Folarin Balogun (suspended)

Doubtful: Mark McKenzie (foot), Cristian Roldan (muscle)

Sports Mole’s predicted XI: Freese; Freeman, Richards, Ream, Robinson; Tillman, Adams, McKennie; Dest, Pepi, Pulisic

## BELGIUM

Out: None

Doubtful: Zeno Debast (leg)

Sports Mole’s predicted XI: Courtois; Castagne, Theate, Mechele, De Cuyper; Vanaken, Tielemans; Trossard, De Bruyne, Doku; De Ketelaere
